\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Definitions of Dunavant (triangle) and Gauss–\+Legendre (1D) quadrature rules. 

Notes\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Dunavant rules are specified in barycentric coordinates $ (\lambda_1, \lambda_2, \lambda_3) $ over the reference triangle.
\item Gauss–\+Legendre rules here are tabulated on \mbox{[}0,1\mbox{]}. Each node is stored as $ (\xi, 1-\xi) $ so tensor products with barycentric/edge formulas are straightforward.
\item The numerical values are standard references; do not alter unless you know what you are doing. 
\end{DoxyItemize}

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{quadrature_8cpp_source}{quadrature.\+cpp}}.
